name: ASUS PRIME B850-PLUS AMD B850 ATX motherboard AM5 DDR5, PCle 5.0 Ready, three M.2slots, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet,DisplayPort, rear USB10Gbps Type-A & Type-c, BlOS FlashBack, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME B850-PLUS AMD B850 ATX motherboard AM5 DDR5, PCle 5.0
description: ASUS PRIME B850-PLUS is a mid-range ATX motherboard for AM5 processors with PCIe 5.0 and DDR5 support.
